prompt: A sports car stationary on a winding coastal road at golden hour, 35mm low-angle composition at tire height, dust settled around the tires, warm side-raking dramatic light sculpting the body panels, heat shimmer visible in the far distance, cinematic 2.39:1 color grade, 16:9. Create this as a simple low-resolution thumbnail-style cinematic still for a prompt library card. Keep the composition clean, readable at small size, realistic, uncluttered, with strong silhouette and clear focal subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage.
negative_prompt: text overlay, UI chrome, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, watermark, logo, illegible details, extra objects, cluttered composition, cartoon, illustration, low-detail mush, deformed product, distorted vehicle, duplicate objects

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage card
settings.camera_angle: match the prompt framing with a single clear subject
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean edges, realistic materials, readable at small size
